trades_referenced: Electrical (lighting - ceiling mounted troffer, suspended linear, recessed linear, feature pendant, cove, pot lights)
Acoustic (ACT ceiling tiles, acoustic wood slat panels)
scope_notes: Level 01 Reflected Ceiling Plan at 1:100 scale

Ceiling assemblies scheduled: XC1 (Existing), C1 (Gypsum Wall Board), C2 (Suspended 2x4 ACT1 - NRC 0.7), C3 (Suspended 3x2 ACT2 - NRC 0.7), C4 (Acoustic Wood Slat Panel - NRC 0.7), C5 (Rated Ceiling - 1hr FRR), C6 (Suspended Acoustic Ceiling Lid with 2x4 ACT1 - NRC 0.7), C7 (Suspended Gypsum Wall Board Ceiling)
Ceiling heights noted throughout plan (e.g., +3500, +3550, +3960, +2400, +3525, +2326)
Ceiling in Electrical Rooms to be rated: 1HR FRR
Ceiling in Janitor Room to be rated: 40 Min FRR
Patch and repair existing ceiling as required noted on west side
Align edge of ceiling to existing storefront wall
Bulkhead wall transition between different ceiling heights
Program Room, Meeting Rooms, Kids area, Bank Processing, Stacks, Adult Lounge, Branch Head Office, Washrooms all identified
Second floor beam above noted

RCP Legend includes: Ceiling Mounted Troffer Light, Suspended Linear Light, Recessed Linear Light, Feature Pendant Light, Reception Feature Light, Cove Light, Return/Exhaust Air Grille, Supply/Outdoor Air Duct, Sensor, Room Temperature Sensor
General notes reference Mechanical and Electrical drawings; all exposed louvres/diffusers to be primed and painted; access panels to Consultant's selection
cross_references: SLC WHE2 System-A (referenced for C6 assembly)

trades_referenced: Structural (structural upgrade scope, trusses, mezzanine framing)
scope_notes: Five building sections at 1:100 scale
Section 1: East-West Section Through Mezzanine
Section 2: North-South Section Through Public Area
Section 3: North-South Section Through Children's and Stacks
Section 4: East-West Section Through Main Entrance
Section 5: East-West Section Through Adult Collection
Key elevations noted: RL 32.080 Main Floor, RL 30.163 Mezzanine Level, RL 30.853 / 30.163 US of Truss, RL 35.738 top of structure
Structural upgrade scope only - See Struct noted on multiple sections
New RTU locations noted - See Mech on Sections 4 and 5
All roof penetrations and curbs to be coordinated to BCABC standards (Section 4)
Parapet restraint detail reference: see L.A-31-4-000
Mezzanine visible in multiple sections with mezzanine level indicated
Neighbouring building interfaces shown on north and south sides
Program Room, Kids, Book Processing, Branch Head Office, Stacks, Service Desk, Adult Lounge, Meeting Room 2 spaces identified in sections
East stair noted as NIC (Not in Contract) in Section 1
Scope of work boundary indicated with dashed lines

trades_referenced: Doors and Hardware (hollow metal, wood, storefront)
Flooring (RF1 Resilient Floor Grey, RF2 Resilient Floor Blue)
Wall Base (B1 Rubber Base Grey, B2 Rubber Base Blue)
Acoustic (ACT1 White, ACT2 Blue acoustic ceiling tiles)
Glazing (glazed interior storefront, tempered safety glass)
Security/Access Control (deadbolt, occupancy indicators, keyed locks)
scope_notes: Door Schedule covers Main Floor and Second Floor doors

Door types: A (Solid Core Wood Non-Rated), B (Solid Core Wood Fire Rated - 45min assembly), C (Hollow Metal Non-Rated), D (Hollow Metal Fire Rated), E (Insulated Metal Door), F (Glazed Interior Storefront), G (Double Door Hollow Core Metal)
Standard door size: 915 wide x 2135 high for most interior doors
Materials include: AMO (aluminium), HM (hollow metal), WD (wood), AL (aluminium), PTDB/PTDD/PTDE finishes
Hardware Groups 1-18 referenced
Door schedule notes include: deadbolt with occupancy indicators, acoustic rated perimeter seals, key locks, bolt permanently/remove functionality, new ADO on existing doors
Existing Storefront doors noted for E002-E007 series

Room Finish Schedule covers all Main Floor rooms: Lobby, Meeting Rooms, Kids, Program Room, Stacks, W/C, Staff W/C, Lunch Room, Janitor, Branch Head Office, Book Processing, Electrical, VPL Storage, Closets

Room finish legend: RF1/RF2 floors, B1/B2 wall base, PT01-PT010 interior paints (White, Salmon Peach, Light Blue, Light Yellow, Medium Blue, Blue Grey, Salmon, Dark Grey), TL Wall Tile, GL Glazing, HPL Laminate Grey, PLY Plywood, PLY2 Plywood Painted, MDO Medium Density Overlay
Ceiling finishes: PT01, ACT1, ACT2
Special notes: Wall protection per drawings, intumescent paint on exposed columns to achieve 45min FRR
Phase Created noted for each door (Stage 3, Stage 5 etc.)
Door schedule notes reference: A-72-4-000 for visibility graphic kit, A-31-11 December 2023 accessibility compliance
cross_references: A-31-11 (Accessibility - December 2023 Guidelines for Accessible and Wayfinding Spaces Version 1.1)
